response.justification: Candidate has strong individual contributor experience (~13+ years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded) and some developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD setup, MCP code generators, test frameworks like Trial and Fluent-Asserts), but lacks the formal people-management background required. No explicit people-management or team-leadership tenure is documented, no mobile-platform ecosystem scale work, and no organizational change leadership. Profile fits a Staff IC track better than an Engineering Manager role focused on engineering productivity at scale.
strengths: Developer-tooling work: built test runner (Trial), assertion library (Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD infra, MCP code generators
13+ years software development across diverse stacks, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Teaching/mentoring evidence via workshops, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos and Code Katas
concerns: No documented people-management or direct-report leadership experience (2-year minimum unmet)
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at scale (brief iOS/Apple TV stint only)
No evidence of leading organizational change or owning team roadmap/performance processes
